message:
feat: make insight limits, alert thresholds, and background threshold configurable

bd-24mj.2: Add insights_with_limit(n) method and --insight-limit CLI
flag. Bottlenecks, influencers, critical path, and all metric top-N
lists now respect the configurable limit (default: 20).

bd-24mj.3: Add AlertThresholds struct with configurable staleness days,
in-progress multiplier, and cascade thresholds. Threaded through
AlertOptions so callers can override defaults. All existing code uses
Default (backward compatible).

bd-aeae: Add AnalysisConfig::background_threshold() method that reads
BVR_BACKGROUND_THRESHOLD env var, falling back to the 200-node default.
Updated all 4 call sites (tui.rs x3, mod.rs x1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -109,6 +109,10 @@ pub struct Cli {
     #[arg(long, action = ArgAction::SetTrue)]
     pub robot_full_stats: bool,
 
+    /// Maximum items per insight category (bottlenecks, influencers, etc.).
+    #[arg(long, default_value_t = 20)]
+    pub insight_limit: usize,
+
     #[arg(long, action = ArgAction::SetTrue)]
     pub robot_priority: bool,
